other_observers: Found by Eric DeFonso on the morning of July 12th.  It was heard by the Colorado Birding Mob later on July 12, and the morning and afternoon of July 13th.
duration: Heard off and on for the entire time
description: When Van Truan and I arrived an hour before sunrise at 4:55am, we heard a Yellow Rail, about 600 yards west of a parking lot.  When we arrived at the parking lot just a few mintues later, a Yellow Rail was also calling there. Later we heard two calling birds at the same time.Here is a recording I made from the parking lot location, when it was dark and no other birds were singing yet.  https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/126267947
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon Percival
